3008210.name: We Heist Too: Theft & Stealth Game
3008210.description:
We Heist Too is a 3D sandbox open-world game set in the quirky, atomic 1960s-inspired city of Rywadorium, where you step into the shoes of a thief leading a double life as a seemingly ordinary citizen. The game blends elements of stealth, adventure, puzzle-solving, and RPG, offering players a rich playground to explore and experiment with various criminal playstyles without quest markers, encouraging creativity and problem-solving in how you approach each heist.

Key features include:

  • Open-world exploration: Roam diverse city regions, interact with numerous objects and environments, and discover resources that can aid your heists or hinder you

  • Multiple playstyles: Choose to be a stealthy mastermind, sneaky and unseen, or a bold outlaw who uses brute force and guns blazing; your decisions impact gameplay and consequences

  • Dynamic interactions: Engage with citizens, decide how to talk or manipulate them, and rely on your partner in crime, Bernard Maidenhoff, for tips and support

  • Resource management and customization: Visit shops, gas stations, and workshops to buy or acquire equipment like gliders or lockpicks, or procure gear from the black market to enhance your thieving capabilities

  • Unique setting and tone: The game’s art style and world draw inspiration from titles like Atomic Heart, Bioshock, and We Happy Few, mixing surreal, dark humor with a retro-futuristic 60s vibe

  • Consequences and challenges: Getting caught by police or robots has serious repercussions, adding tension and stakes to your criminal endeavors

Overall, We Heist Too offers a sandbox thief simulator experience with stealth, puzzle, and RPG elements wrapped in a colorful, surreal, and humorous atomic 60s world. It invites players to craft their own criminal stories with freedom and creativity, making each heist a unique challenge and adventure.
3008210.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
